meta.recoveredFrom: Monday Evening Pulse scheduled task timed out 4/27 at 6:45 PM MT — recovered manually 4/29.

stella.note: WK17 Roll-Up reporting week is Apr 19–25 (Stella's Sat-end week).

klaviyo.note: Placed Order attribution still in 24–72h lag; Triple Whale figures from Cassie are source of truth for email revenue.

signals.text: $92.5K (-2.9% WoW) — 2nd best week YTD, +545% YoY. Pullback after the W16 peak. YTD now over $1M. Cassie reads the dip as not a concern.
$26.2K (-8.1% WoW). AOV $32.15 (-3.9%). Sessions 23,980. CVR held at 1.7%. Returning customers carrying — 55.3% of revenue.
ROAS 0.5x on $5,064 spend (+5.2%). Purchases -33.3% to 66, attributed revenue -32.7% to $2,489. Prospecting/Traffic line burned $1,589 for $104 (0.1x).
IG engagement -90.3% to 1,448 (cadence problem — 5 posts vs prior weeks). Reach -59.5%. Followers still up +260 to 79,164.
+41% WoW on platform revenue ($7,488), ROAS 1.73x. New Brand deodorant campaign delivering $6.52 ROAS in week 1 — well above the $4 benchmark. [humble vegan deodorant] exact match at 8.24x.
Net +10 (was +50 last week — 40-sub deceleration). 81 new / 71 cancelled / 28 churned. Active subs 4,124.

watchItems.why: $1,589 spend → $104 attributed (0.1x) — dead budget. Only Retention (1.2x) is paying. Brief Stella + BWM to kill or reallocate before next Monday.

watchItems.action: Lean into Stella's new Brand deodorant Search campaign
watchItems.why: $6.52 ROAS in week 1 vs $4 benchmark; [humble vegan deodorant] exact at 8.24x. Approve a budget bump and ask Stella for the PMax restructure plan informed by this data.
-58% WoW driven by availability. Move to Holly @ PLTFRM today — preventable lost revenue while we ramp NB ad spend.
Engagement -90.3% on -59.5% reach with only 5 posts. Brief Calvin/Cassie: back to 7+/wk; replicate the Be Humble Giveaway format (474 likes / 841 comments).
Emerging NB ad performer but CVR compressed 36.9% → 29.7% WoW. Don't scale NB spend into a leaky funnel. Calvin to brief refreshed PDP.

amazon.insight: Pullback week — $92.5K (-2.9%) after W16's record. 2nd best YTD, +545% YoY; YTD > $1.05M. TACOS 7.3% (within guardrail) as ad spend ramped +40.5% to $6,754. Buy Box softened to 65.0% on Simply Unscented dropping 13.1pp and Texas Cedarwood (B07JMWR5P3) FBA stockout. Moroccan Rose (B091V49K5T) emerging NB performer but CVR compressed 36.9%→29.7%. Approved to scale May ad spend to $75K with 15% TACOS KPI.

dtc.insight: DTC pulled back to $26.2K (-8.1%) after the W16 breakout. AOV slipped to $32.15 (-3.9%) but stayed above the $30 floor. CVR held 1.7%. Returning customers (55.3%) carried; new revenue dropped harder. Email's share of DTC compressed to 21.1% — Earth Day Giveaway was a non-revenue play.

subscriptions.insight: Net +10 — still positive but a 40-sub deceleration from W16's +50. New 81 / cancelled 71 / churned 28 / reactivated 3. Active subs 4,124. Need Cassie's cohort source to know whether this is timing or the W16 acquisition cohort cooling.

topPost.description: Be Humble. Do Good. Giveaway Reel — drove most of weekly engagement.

social.insight: Engagement collapsed -90.3% on -59.5% reach — cause is volume. Only 5 posts published vs prior cadence. Top post (Be Humble Giveaway, 474 likes / 841 comments) shows the giveaway format still works. Cadence back to 7+/wk; replicate giveaway format with one more drop in May.

google.highlight: New Brand deodorant campaign at $6.52 ROAS in week 1 (above $4 benchmark). [humble vegan deodorant] exact match at 8.24x.
google.watch: Brand & non-brand lip balm zero conversions; soap demand exists but budget-constrained. Stella shifting budget to soap; PMax restructure incoming.

paidMedia.insight: Meta ROAS 0.5x is the standout red — close to breakeven, with Prospecting/Traffic 2026 line dead at 0.1x. Stella Paid Search saved the paid blend (1.73x, +41% WoW) on the strength of the new Brand deodorant campaign (6.52x). Blended paid ROAS ~1.06x at $9.4K spend.

ga4.insight: Sessions pulled back to 26,795 (-12.7%). CVR steady at 1.10%. Direct traffic share jumped to 45% — could indicate brand demand. Aluminum-Free Deodorant PDP still the workhorse at 8,324 sessions.

campaigns.name: Earth Day Giveaway (4/22)
campaigns.note: Giveaway entry play, not a revenue campaign. 132 unsubs.

klaviyo.insight: Email revenue -28.3% to $5,519 (Triple Whale). Only one campaign in the window — Earth Day Giveaway — at 47.9% open / 0.76% click on 44K sends. Giveaway entry, not revenue play. Flows are the steady carriers.

tacos.note: Within guardrail but ramping toward 15% KPI as we scale to $75K May spend.

blendedPaidRoas.note: Stella Paid Search 1.73x lifted blend; Meta 0.5x dragged it down.

socialPosts.note: Hit MTD target but week-over-week cadence collapsed — see Social signal.
